headline: Denied Medical Treatment Workers’ Compensation Claim Preparation Checklist — St. George
articleBody:
Denied Medical Treatment Workers’ Compensation Claim Preparation Checklist for St. George Clients

Before your Denied Medical Treatment Workers’ Compensation Claim appointment with Just Work Comp Law, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Incident report
2. Medical records
3. Witness statements
4. Employer notification
5. Doctor notes

Contact Just Work Comp Law at 801-746-0290 to get started.
